title: 『LRT Client』:The pinnacle of rail!
body:
# Brief introduction **This is an MTR mod-based integration package on which related affiliate mods and extension mods are added. Feeling like playing MTR Taika? Try this package to make your game smooth by adding optimization mods.** # disposition | > **minimum:** | CPU | memory | Internet | FPS expected to be achieved | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Intel Pentium D or AMD Athlon 64 (K8) 2.6 GHz | 4GB | - | 0 - 150FPS | | > **recommend:** | CPU | memory | Internet | FPS expected to be achieved | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Intel Core i4 or AMD Athlon II 2.8 GHz(or above) | 12GB(or above) | - | 8 ~ 4000FPS(Theoretically it can reach 4000) | # Screenshots of the game (multiplayer): ![icon](https://gitcode.net/mincraftmojang/fallacy-mountain-extension/-/raw/master/2023-06-17_19.39.56.png) ![icon](https://gitcode.net/mincraftmojang/fallacy-mountain-extension/-/raw/master/2023-06-17_19.40.10.png) ![icon](https://gitcode.net/mincraftmojang/fallacy-mountain-extension/-/raw/master/se.png) # Game Screenshots (Single Player): ![icon](https://gitcode.net/mincraftmojang/fallacy-mountain-extension/-/raw/master/2023-06-17_11.55.00.png) ![icon](https://gitcode.net/mincraftmojang/fallacy-mountain-extension/-/raw/master/2023-06-17_13.54.04.png) ![icon](https://gitcode.net/mincraftmojang/fallacy-mountain-extension/-/raw/master/2023-06-17_13.58.06.png) > **Copyright statement: The above screenshots shall not be stolen without permission (video-recordable)** # illustrate **The integration package is packaged by HMCL, a third-party launcher based in China.** # Game content ***In the game, you can experience extremely realistic subway systems, urban construction projects, subway projects, etc. If you are an avid "iron friend", then hurry up and try the China Pack! It doesn't matter if you don't know how to use MTR mods, you can find tutorials from [MTR BBS](https://www.mtrbbs.top/).*** # Notes * **If the Fabric loader prompts a mod error, delete the mod: [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) or [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)**
